summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AlphaLens stock investing app. Backend APIs working perfectly with real FMP data integration. Frontend fully functional after fixing Select component issues.
passed_tests: API Status Check - AlphaLens API responding correctly
Stock Analysis (AAPL) - Real data with scores and signals
Stock Analysis (MSFT) - Real data with scores and signals
Recommendations - Top 5 stocks with JNJ as top pick (67.5/100)
Rankings (value, growth, momentum, quality) - All strategy rankings working
Stock Search - 7 search results for AAPL query
AI Chat - 4025 character response to investment questions
Dashboard page loads with recommendations and analytics
Navigation sidebar - All page transitions working
Rankings page - Strategy tabs and stock listings functional
Screener page - Filters and screening functionality working
Chat page - AI assistant interface and messaging working
Search functionality - Stock search with dropdown results
Select components - Fixed empty string value issues

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor search result navigation issue, all core functionality working)
